scripts.package: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ..\..\dist | Out-Null; $files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\.git' -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules[\\/]\.cache' }; Compress-Archive -Force -Path (($files | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer }) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName) -DestinationPath ..\..\dist\best-cat.zip"
